steps.title: Identify the two clauses
steps.content: The text joins two independent clauses: Larrazolo was elected governor of New Mexico, and in 1928 he became the nation's first Hispanic U.S. Senator. The blank must correctly connect those clauses.

steps.title: Use comma plus conjunction
steps.content: A omits the comma needed before the coordinating conjunction, B creates a comma splice, and D fuses the two independent clauses without punctuation or a conjunction. The answer is C.
